(M0290) Unknown High Risk Factors High risk factors characterizing this patient: unknown. 0 = No, 1 = Yes CHAR 1 x x
M0300_CURR_RESIDEN (M0300) Current Residence Current residence. 01 = Patient owned or rented residence (house, apartment, or mobile home owned or rented by patient/couple/significant other).
02 = Family member residence.
03 = Boarding home or rented room.
04 = Board and care or assisted living facility.
05 = Other (specify) CHAR 2 x x
